schedule: Event-based; hosts events on select Saturdays and Sundays throughout the month
hours: Saturday events: 9:00 PM - 3:00 AM; Sunday Funday events: 12:00 PM - 5:00 PM
about: Black Ring Swing is a free-to-join lifestyle community hosting no-pressure swinger events, meet and greets, hotel takeovers, and travel throughout MD, DC, VA, PA, and beyond. Starting July 2026, they will also operate as hosts of Tabu Social Club in Catonsville, Maryland.

schedule: Event-based; periodic hotel takeover events in the DC/Maryland area (registration required)
hours: Typically 2:00 PM - 3:00 AM for hotel takeover events
about: Friction Parties is the premier nationally recognized hotel takeover party for upscale, HWP couples, hosting events in the DC/Maryland area and nationwide. Founded over 20 years ago, it is a women-owned business requiring pre-registration with no walk-ins allowed.

address: Address Given upon R.S.V.P. & Ticket Purchase, Port Deposit
schedule: Event-based; hosts events at various venues including The Private Affair in Port Deposit, MD, plus annual Shades of Mocha week in Jamaica
hours: Typically 9:00 PM - 2:00 AM for on-premise events
about: Mocha Parties is an interracial-themed lifestyle events group celebrating diversity with the motto 'Interracial with an Open Mind,' hosting events across multiple U.S. regions. They also organize the annual Shades of Mocha week at Hedonism II in Negril, Jamaica.

Private Party (Live Your Lifestyle) is a lifestyle event organizer based in Aberdeen, Maryland, hosting private events for adults 21 and older. The group operates on an event-by-event basis with details provided upon RSVP.

schedule: Event-based; monthly house parties and themed events on scheduled dates throughout the year
about: Rhavens Haven is a lifestyle social group hosting house parties, private events, and destination trips for like-minded adults. They offer a friendly, no-pressure, sex-positive environment welcoming people of all backgrounds and experience levels.

address: Address given upon R.S.V.P., Mount Airy area
schedule: Event-based; monthly meet & greets and themed parties
hours: No admission after 11 PM; overnight rooms available
about: Secret Encounters is a private social club in Mount Airy featuring a 5,000+ sq ft playhouse with six themed rooms for vetted members. They host meet & greets and themed parties in an intimate, no-pressure, BYOB environment for adults 21 and older.

hours: Wednesday-Friday: 9 PM - 3 AM, Saturday: 9 PM - 4 AM, Sunday: 8:30 PM - 2:30 AM
about: Shadows Private Club is the DMV's premier lifestyle club for couples and singles, open since 2017 with themed parties, free food on Saturdays, and a BYOB setup with complimentary mixers. Saturdays are reserved for couples and single ladies only, and their selective membership process ensures a safe, sophisticated environment.

schedule: Friday and Saturday; occasional Sunday events
hours: Friday: 9 PM - 2 AM, Saturday: 9 PM - 3 AM
about: Tabu Social Club is a private membership BYOB lifestyle club in Catonsville offering themed parties, DJ nights, and happy hours for open-minded adults 21 and older. A Black-owned and Women-owned establishment with complimentary mixers, free weekend food, and host couples available nightly for new member tours.

address: 255 Linton Run Road, Port Deposit, MD 21904, Port Deposit, 21904
hours: Friday: 9 PM - 2 AM (special events only), Saturday: 8 PM - 2 AM; must arrive by 11 PM
about: The Private Affair is a members-only on-premise lifestyle club with nearly 25 years of operation, featuring 10,000 sq ft of party space with playrooms, professional DJs, and a BYOB bar. Located on secluded private property off I-95, it offers a nightclub atmosphere with themed events, buffet dining, and dancing.
